runId: 20260519-从零搭建一个校园自习室预约管理系统-包含用户端注册登录-自习室楼层与座位管理-座位分时预约-预约
assumptions: No project files were detected outside runtime directories; plan treats implementation as an empty-repo build.
Implementation must stay lightweight: Python stdlib backend using http.server, sqlite3, unittest; static HTML/CSS/JS frontend.
No heavy third-party middleware or package-manager dependency is required.

tasks.title: Create lightweight project skeleton and API contract
acceptance: REST contract covers auth, rooms, floors, seats, reservations, reports, admin review

tasks.title: Implement sqlite schema and data access layer
acceptance: Entities and relationships cover users, rooms, floors, seats, reservations, reports, admin actions, usage stats

tasks.title: Implement REST API with http.server
acceptance: Registration/login, seat management, time-slot reservation, timeout release, report review, and stats endpoints work

tasks.title: Add backend unittest coverage
acceptance: All REST endpoints have unittest coverage

tasks.title: Build user mini-program-style static pages
acceptance: Registration/login, room/floor/seat browsing, reservation, active booking, and violation report pages exist with form validation

tasks.title: Build admin static pages
acceptance: Room/floor/seat management, report review, usage statistics, and paginated lists exist with form validation

tasks.title: Wire frontend pages to REST API and document local run flow
acceptance: User and admin pages call backend endpoints
Local startup and smoke flow are documented

tasks.title: QA gate
outputs: .imfine/runs/20260519-从零搭建一个校园自习室预约管理系统-包含用户端注册登录-自习室楼层与座位管理-座位分时预约-预约/qa/
acceptance: Manual smoke covers auth, reservation, timeout release, report review, and stats

tasks.title: Reviewer gate
outputs: .imfine/runs/20260519-从零搭建一个校园自习室预约管理系统-包含用户端注册登录-自习室楼层与座位管理-座位分时预约-预约/review/
acceptance: No blocking correctness, security, data integrity, or missing-test findings remain

tasks.title: Technical Writer gate
acceptance: Setup, run, API, data model, and manual smoke instructions are current

tasks.title: Project Knowledge Updater gate
acceptance: Project knowledge reflects source layout, commands, architecture, and constraints

tasks.title: Committer gate
acceptance: Commit message summarizes the campus study room reservation system implementation

tasks.title: Archive gate
outputs: .imfine/runs/20260519-从零搭建一个校园自习室预约管理系统-包含用户端注册登录-自习室楼层与座位管理-座位分时预约-预约/archive/
acceptance: Run evidence includes plan, implementation summary, QA, review, commit, docs, and final status

reworkPolicy.onQaFailure: Return to the owning dev task, then rerun T08.
reworkPolicy.onReviewBlocker: Return to the owning dev task, then rerun T08 and T09.
